name: Simple Weapons
desc: Simple weapons are easy to use and require minimal training.
Includes: club, dagger, greatclub, handaxe, javelin, light hammer, mace, quarterstaff, scimitar, shortbow, spear, light crossbow, heavy crossbow, longbow.

name: Martial Weapons
desc: Martial weapons require training to use effectively.

Includes: battleaxe, flail, glaive, greataxe, greatsword, halberd, lance, longsword, morningstar, pike, rapier, scimitar, shortsword, trident, warhammer, whip, bludgeoning weapons, piercing weapons, slashing weapons.

name: Light Crossbow
desc: A ranged weapon that fires bolts.
Properties: Ammunition, Loading, Range (80/320)

name: Heavy Crossbow
desc: A powerful ranged weapon that fires bolts.
Properties: Ammunition, Heavy, Loading, Range (100/400)

name: Longsword
desc: A versatile melee weapon.
Properties: Finesse, Heavy, Light, Reach, Two-Handed, Versatile

name: Greatsword
desc: A massive two-handed weapon.
Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed

name: Chain Mail
desc: Heavy armor that provides excellent protection.
AC: 16
Requires Strength 13 or higher to avoid disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

name: Plate Armor
desc: The finest heavy armor available.
AC: 18
Requires Strength 15 or higher to avoid disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

name: Leather Armor
desc: Light armor made from cured leather.
AC: 11 + Dexterity modifier

name: Studded Leather
desc: Light armor reinforced with leather and metal studs.
AC: 12 + Dexterity modifier

name: Adventuring Gear
desc: Essential equipment for adventurers.

Includes: backpack, bedroll, belt pouch, candle, crowbar, flask, grappling hook, hammer, hammer and pick, holy symbol, lantern, mess kit, mirror, oil, pitons, potion, rope, scroll case, signal whistle, spellcasting focus, torch, waterskin.

name: Backpack
desc: A sturdy bag for carrying supplies.
Capacity: Can hold up to 30 pounds of equipment.

name: Spellcasting Focus
desc: An item used as a spellcasting focus for arcane and divine magic.
Types: Arcane focus (orb, rod, staff, wand), Divine focus (holy symbol), Druidic focus (druidic focus).

name: Potion of Healing
desc: A red liquid that restores hit points when consumed.
Effect: Restores 2d4 + 2 hit points.

name: Cloak of Protection
desc: A magical cloak that provides defensive bonuses.
Effect: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Ring of Protection
desc: A magical ring that provides defensive bonuses.
Effect: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Staff of Power
desc: A powerful magical staff.
Effect: +2 to AC and saving throws, can cast spells, stores spell slots.

name: Shield
desc: A piece of armor that provides additional protection.
Effect: +2 to AC when wielded.

name: Dagger
desc: A small blade that can be thrown or used in melee.
Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (20/60)

name: Shortsword
desc: A light melee weapon.
Properties: Finesse, Light
